title: FileLister
excerpt: A powerful duplicate file management tool for macOS and cross-platform use.
full_description: FileLister is a specialized utility designed to regain storage space by identifying and managing duplicate files. It uses deep cryptographic hashing (SHA-256) to ensure 100% accuracy, moving beyond simple name or size comparisons. It supports local drives, external storage, and cloud-synced folders like OneDrive or Google Drive.
advantages: Zero false positives with hash verification
pitfalls: High RAM usage on multi-million file scans
OS-specific trash handling complexities
Cloud-only file (on-demand) access issues

roadmap.task: Native macOS Swift/SwiftUI implementation
SHA-256 cryptographic duplicate detection
Python-based secure key generator integration
Clear legacy registration data
Deploy release v1.2.0
Cryptographic license system (v1.2.0)
Microsoft Entra App Registration for Graph API
OAuth 2.0 / Device Code flow for OneDrive auth
Graph API file crawler (names, hashes, sizes, paths)
Unified local + cloud duplicate report
Edge case fixes for SHA-256 detection

title: VibeCoding Ideas
excerpt: A public documentation portal for app concepts and implementation roadmaps.
full_description: VibeCoding Ideas is a minimal, content-focused portal designed to publicly document app concepts. It serves as a bridge between rough ideas and full development, providing a space for AI-assisted expansion of descriptions and technical implementation plans.
pitfalls: Requires manual data entry for new ideas
Potential for 'idea bloat' without execution
Static nature limits complex interactions

roadmap.task: Portal architecture, design tokens & glassmorphism UI
Dynamic JSON-based card rendering
Modal interaction with full idea detail
Roadmap section per idea in modal
Client-side search & category tag filters
Offline admin screen to draft new ideas as JSON
Download counter per app — track total downloads and display live count on each idea card
License buyer registry — store purchaser email, license key, app ID, and purchase date; accessible via a private admin view

title: DrawIO to Mermaid Converter
excerpt: A tool to convert visual DrawIO diagrams into maintainable Mermaid.js code.
full_description: This tool aims to bridge the gap between visual diagramming and 'Diagrams as Code'. By converting XML-based DrawIO files into Mermaid.js syntax, it allows developers to store diagrams directly in their Git repositories in a readable, diff-able text format.
advantages: Eliminates binary/image file bloat in Git
pitfalls: Complex DrawIO shapes may not map 1:1
Styling/Colors might be lost in translation
DrawIO's nested group structures are complex

roadmap.task: XML parser: unpack mxGraphModel compressed format
Shape & connection mapping rules → Mermaid syntax
Split-screen UI (paste XML left, live Mermaid right)
CLI wrapper (Node/Python) for Git hooks & CI pipelines

ai_features.name: Batch File Conversion
ai_features.monetization: Primary PRO unlock — power users hit the single-file limit fast

ai_features.monetization: PRO add-on — widens appeal beyond Mermaid-only teams

ai_features.monetization: Enterprise use cases — unlocks engineering & architecture teams

title: Agenda Creator
excerpt: Smart workshop and meeting organizer that optimizes for participant availability.
full_description: Agenda Creator automates the coordination of complex workshops and meetings. It collects topics from participants, analyzes their availability, and intelligently finds the best time slot. It then organizes the full workshop schedule and sends automated calendar invites and organized emails.
advantages: Optimizes time spent in the office
Ensures all high-priority topics are covered
pitfalls: Complexity of multi-timezone scheduling
Varying calendar API permissions
Participant delay in providing topics

roadmap.task: Project scaffold (Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui)
Organizer form: create workshop + optional Excel upload
Participant portal with one-click link & availability input
Smart scheduling constraint solver engine
Auto-send final agenda + ICS calendar invites via email
Organizer dashboard
Google Workspace & Microsoft 365 calendar integration
AI-assisted topic clustering & agenda building

title: VisualExif
excerpt: Native macOS app for surgical metadata inspection and removal. Protect your privacy before sharing photos.
full_description: In an era where every photo carries hidden data — GPS coordinates, device fingerprints, personal timestamps — VisualExif gives you surgical control over what you share. Drag a file, inspect its secrets, and neutralize exactly what you don't want. Built as a native macOS app with a bundled ExifTool engine, it requires zero external dependencies and processes everything locally. Part of the Single Use Apps collection, with a free tier and a one-time €9.99 PRO license.
features: Selective Tag Removal (GPS, EXIF, IPTC, XMP, MakerNotes)
stages: Core drag & drop UI + metadata inspector
Free/PRO tier split + license verification system
advantages: One-time payment, lifetime license, no subscription
pitfalls: macOS only — no Windows or Linux support
ExifTool must be updated as new formats emerge
RAW format support varies by camera vendor
PRO feature gating may slow free-tier adoption

roadmap.task: Drag & drop interface
Real-time metadata inspector panel
Selective tag removal — GPS, EXIF, IPTC, XMP, MakerNotes (PRO)
Folder batch processing + progress bar
Bundled ExifTool v13.57 + notarization
Remove All Metadata — one-click (Free)
Remove GPS Only (Free)
Core format support: JPG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, MOV, MP4 (Free)
Metadata export — CSV / JSON before cleaning (PRO)
Before / after metadata comparison view (PRO)
Preset profiles — Social Media Safe, Press Release, etc. (PRO)
Rename by metadata fields — date, camera, GPS region (PRO)
Watch folder — auto-clean new files on arrival (PRO)
RAW format support — CR2, CR3, ARW, NEF, ORF, DNG (PRO)
Date Fixer — sync filesystem dates with capture timestamp (PRO)
Operation history & undo with backed-up originals (PRO)

title: MetaStrip
excerpt: Cross-platform image metadata cleaner. Inspect hidden data and strip it — desktop app or self-hosted web server.
full_description: Every photo carries hidden data: GPS coordinates, device fingerprints, author names, and timestamps embedded invisibly in the file. MetaStrip surfaces all of it and lets you remove exactly what you choose. Upload JPEG, PNG, or TIFF images, inspect metadata by category, pick a preset (Privacy Mode, Full Clean, or Custom), and download stripped images — individually or as a ZIP. Runs as a native Electron desktop app on macOS, Windows, and Linux, or as a self-hosted Express web server for teams.
features: Drag & Drop Batch Upload (up to 100 files / 100 MB each)
Full Metadata Inspector (GPS, Timestamps, Author, Camera & Lens)
Presets: Privacy Mode, Full Clean, Custom Selection
stages: Core API: metadata read & strip engine (sharp + exifr)
React Frontend with drag-and-drop and metadata inspector
Preset system and custom per-category toggles
Electron shell for native desktop packaging
advantages: Works as both a desktop app and a web server — one codebase
Per-category surgical control, not just all-or-nothing
ICC color profiles and orientation always preserved
pitfalls: Server mode sends images over the network — not suitable for sensitive files without HTTPS
TIFF support is limited by sharp library constraints
No support for RAW formats (CR2, ARW, NEF) in v1

roadmap.task: Express API: POST /api/read (metadata inspection)
Express API: POST /api/strip (selective metadata removal)
React UI: DropZone, MetadataViewer, CriteriaPanel, ResultsPanel
Preset system: Privacy Mode, Full Clean, Custom
ZIP batch download via JSZip
Electron shell: desktop app packaging
macOS .dmg, Windows .exe, Linux .AppImage distributables
Code signing & notarization (macOS)
RAW format support (CR2, ARW, NEF, DNG)
Before / after metadata diff view
Metadata export to CSV / JSON before stripping

title: PropInsight
excerpt: Automated real-estate market analyzer and historical price tracker.
full_description: PropInsight is an intelligent real-estate data aggregator designed to provide a comprehensive overview of local property markets. By autonomously scanning major real-estate portals, it captures and cross-references critical data points including historical pricing, geographic distribution, and visual assets.
pitfalls: Anti-scraping measures on major portals
Data quality/normalization challenges
High storage requirements for photos
Legal/Terms of Service compliance

roadmap.task: Headless scraper (Playwright) for property listings
PostGIS spatial DB setup for neighborhood grouping
Price-drop tracking engine + push notifications
Web UI dashboard for market analysis
Automated reporting system
